chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. Const. Petition No. D- 156 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 803/2024 (u/a) 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on CMA 652/2024 (Ex) 4. For orders on CMA 653/2024 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case. (Matter is already fixed on 14.03.2024) 20.02.2024. Syed Jaffer Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioners. -.-.-. Learned counsel for petitioners by filing statement does not press the petition and submits that he would avail remedy before the proper forum in accordance with law, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
